error.signature: SSRF: Request to internal network address blocked

verdict.summary: Server-Side Request Forgery allows attackers to access internal services via application.

dead_ends.why_fails: Misses 0.0.0.0, IPv6 ::1, 169.254.x.x metadata, DNS rebinding, and decimal IP notation.

dead_ends.action: Validate URL scheme is HTTPS only
dead_ends.why_fails: Does not prevent requests to internal HTTPS services.

workarounds.action: Use allowlist of permitted external domains/IPs
workarounds.how: Only allow requests to known-good external domains

workarounds.action: Resolve DNS and validate IP is not in private ranges before connecting
